name: pr-comments-resolver
description: Resolve unresolved PR/MR review comments across GitHub and GitLab

interface.shortDescription: Resolve unresolved PR/MR review comments from Codex
interface.longDescription: Automates unresolved review comment resolution across GitHub and GitLab with configurable verification commands.
defaultPrompt: Resolve unresolved review comments on my current PR.
Resolve unresolved comments for PR #42 and run project checks.
Find unresolved MR comments and fix them one by one.
